description: Required CLI command checks for the learning-series MSL toolchains, SBOM tooling, GitHub Spec Kit, and required agent CLI surfaces.

policy.agentCliPolicy: codex, claude, the standalone GitHub Copilot CLI, and Google Antigravity CLI are required cross-platform CLI surfaces. Google Antigravity replaces Gemini CLI. macOS uses Homebrew, Windows uses WinGet, and Linux uses the checksum-verified official vendor installer. npm fallback installations are maintained through npm-agent-cli-registry.json.
policy.hostingAccountPolicy: Learners need an account on the selected institutional Git hosting system. A GitHub account is required only for the direct GitHub profile or optional GitHub Copilot sign-in.
policy.forgejoClientPolicy: No additional Forgejo client CLI is required. Bootstrap automation uses normal git, HTTPS credentials from a secure Git credential helper, and the Forgejo REST API.
policy.linuxWithoutBrew: Linux without Homebrew uses distro packages where available. .NET, Swift, Syft, and GitHub Spec Kit may require external package sources or uv-based installation. Antigravity CLI uses its checksum-verified official vendor installer.

tools.purpose: C#/.NET MSL CLI toolchain for learning-series repositories
Go MSL CLI toolchain for learning-series repositories
Java runtime command from the required JDK
Java compiler command from the required JDK
Python MSL CLI toolchain for learning-series repositories
Python MSL CLI toolchain for learning-series repositories
Rust package/build command from the required Rust toolchain
Rust compiler command from the required Rust toolchain
Swift MSL CLI toolchain; macOS uses the Apple toolchain, Windows uses WinGet Swift.Toolchain, and Linux requires a separately configured Swift toolchain
Local Markdown/HTML link and anchor checker matching the CI documentation gate
GitHub Spec Kit CLI for specification-driven development
OpenAI Codex command-line agent for AI-assisted development
Claude Code command-line agent for AI-assisted development
Google Antigravity command-line agent for AI-assisted development; replaces Gemini CLI
Standalone GitHub Copilot command-line agent for AI-assisted development
